_doc: Local push notifications for cooldown reminders + retention pings. Wraps the godot-mobile-plugins/godot-notification-scheduler plugin (iOS+Android). NotificationManager autoload reads this file. feature_enabled is the master kill-switch — when false, no permission prompt is shown, no notifications scheduled, settings switch is hidden. Override via Firebase Remote Config to disable the feature in prod without a release. Texts come from data/translations.json (notification.* keys) — DO NOT hardcode strings here.

android_channel._doc: One channel for all reminders. Player sees a single switch in our UI; Android requires a channel under the hood since 8.0.

quiet_hours._doc: If a notification's local fire time falls inside [start, end), it is shifted forward to end. 24h format. Reduces unsubscribe rate. Set both to 0 to disable.

events._doc: Per-event toggles + content keys. id_offset is the integer ID base used by the plugin (must be unique across events; shop packs add product index on top).

shop_pack_ready._doc: Per-pack notification — actual id is id_offset + pack_index (pack_01=0, pack_02=1, ...).
